message:
feat(fwc): add quickstart guide, output format guide, and decision guide to doc_readme

Adds three agent-facing documentation surfaces to help agents and users
discover how to use FWC effectively without prior context.

Quickstart guide (get_quickstart / format_quickstart_toon):
- 8-step walkthrough from discovery (fwc list) through execution
  (fwc invoke) to review (fwc history)
- Each step includes a command and explanation

Output format guide (get_output_format_guide):
- Documents all 7 output formats: TOON (default), JSON, NDJSON, Table,
  CSV, YAML, Markdown
- Each entry includes flag, when_to_use, and is_default indicator

Decision guide (get_decision_guide / format_decision_guide_toon):
- 10 goal-oriented entries mapping agent intent to recommended commands
- Covers: single ops, chaining, workflows, batch, templates, resume,
  debugging, preflight, and tool export
- Classifies each as primitive/workflow/session/template surface

TOON-first explanation (toon_first_explanation):
- Documents the TOON-first design philosophy and when to use JSON
- Covers safety boundaries: read-only vs write vs destructive commands

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
